prompt_task: You are given shallow paired-end whole genome sequencing FASTQ files (find.deletion.r1.fq.gz, find.deletion.r2.fq.gz) simulated from a chromosome of the human genome hg38 which contains a large deletion. Your task is to identify the approximate coordinates of this deletion relative to the reference genome. Report the chromosome, the start coordinate, and the end coordinate of the deletion, with both coordinates rounded to the nearest 100,000 bases. Format your answer as chr:start-end. For example: chr1:10000000-10300000. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
